creator: damianos@knoxbug.org
text:
1. A URL for the user group's website.

http://knoxbug.org

2. An email contact address of a human in charge, for use by our visitors and website administrators.

damianos@knoxbug.org

3. A short (one paragraph) description of the user group.

The Knoxville TN BSD User Group (KnoxBUG) meets once a month. For more information, please visit http://knoxbug.org and/or subscribe to our mailing list http://lists.nycbug.org/mailman/listinfo/knoxbug-talk
